mapper.sql: id, case_title, source_type, source_id, product_id, product_name, comment_text, image_signal, sentiment_label, risk_types, risk_level, evidence, operation_result, feedback_type, tags, created_time, updated_time, deleted
mapper.insert:
insert ignore into litemall_ai_case_knowledge
case_title, source_type, source_id, product_id, product_name, comment_text, image_signal, sentiment_label, risk_types, risk_level, evidence, operation_result, feedback_type, tags, created_time, updated_time, deleted,
#{caseTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{productId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{commentText,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{imageSignal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sentimentLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{riskTypes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{riskLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evidence,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{operationResult,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{feedbackType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tags,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
mapper.select: select from litemall_ai_case_knowledge where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and deleted = 0

select from litemall_ai_case_knowledge
deleted = 0
and (case_title like concat('%', #{keyword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') or product_name like concat('%', #{keyword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') or comment_text like concat('%', #{keyword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') or tags like concat('%', #{keyword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'))
and risk_level = #{riskLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and sentiment_label = #{sentimentLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
order by updated_time desc, id desc
select from litemall_ai_case_knowledge where deleted = 0 order by updated_time desc, id desc limit 500
mapper.insert: insert ignore into litemall_ai_case_knowledge( case_title, source_type, source_id, product_id, product_name, comment_text, image_signal, sentiment_label, risk_types, risk_level, evidence, operation_result, feedback_type, tags, created_time, updated_time, deleted ) select concat('椋庨櫓妗堜緥 #', t.id) as case_title, 'risk_task' as source_type, t.id as source_id, t.product_id, t.product_name, t.review_text, t.image_url, t.sentiment_label, t.risk_type, t.risk_level, coalesce(a.evidence_json, t.handle_note, t.review_text), coalesce(t.handle_note, s.feedback_note, t.status), s.feedback_type, concat_ws(',', t.risk_type, t.risk_level, t.sentiment_label, t.product_name), now(), now(), 0 from litemall_ai_review_risk_task t left join litemall_review_ai_analysis a on a.id = t.analysis_id and a.deleted = 0 left join ( select risk_task_id, max(feedback_type) feedback_type, max(feedback_note) feedback_note from litemall_ai_agent_feedback where deleted = 0 group by risk_task_id ) s on s.risk_task_id = t.id where t.deleted = 0 and t.review_text is not null and t.review_text != ''
mapper.select: select risk_level name, count(1) value from litemall_ai_case_knowledge where deleted = 0 group by risk_level order by value desc
select sentiment_label name, count(1) value from litemall_ai_case_knowledge where deleted = 0 group by sentiment_label order by value desc
select count(1) from litemall_ai_case_knowledge where deleted = 0
